summary: Completed bug fix verification for SwarmSim iteration 15. All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend getTypeLabels function verified working correctly. Three bug fixes confirmed working: (1) build_prediction_question returns user's question as-is if >10 chars, auto-generates domain-appropriate questions otherwise; (2) KEYWORD_MAP includes nifty 50, sensex, banknifty, sp500 etc. and classify_topic correctly classifies topics; (3) PREDICTION_TYPE_LABELS uses YES/NO for OUTCOME, POSITIVE/NEGATIVE for SENTIMENT, UP/DOWN for DIRECTIONAL.

minor.issue: Legacy predictions in database have incorrect domain='general' and use UP/DOWN labels for OUTCOME type - these were created before bug fixes. New predictions will have correct values.

passed_tests: build_prediction_question returns user's question as-is when > 10 chars
build_prediction_question trims whitespace from user's question
build_prediction_question auto-generates for short question (< 10 chars)
build_prediction_question uses 'headed' template for financial topics
build_prediction_question uses 'outcome' template for election topics
build_prediction_question uses 'happen' template for sports topics
Session e72fbced with topic='nifty 50' has domain='financial'
freeze_prediction OUTCOME type uses YES/NO direction
freeze_prediction SENTIMENT type uses POSITIVE/NEGATIVE/MIXED direction
Frontend getTypeLabels DIRECTIONAL returns UP/DOWN/FLAT labels
Frontend getTypeLabels OUTCOME returns YES/NO/PARTIAL labels
Frontend getTypeLabels SENTIMENT returns POSITIVE/NEGATIVE/MIXED labels
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 VERIFIED: build_prediction_question() at line 195 correctly returns user's question if > 10 chars, otherwise auto-generates domain-appropriate question
Bug 2 VERIFIED: KEYWORD_MAP at line 146 includes 'nifty 50', 'sensex', 'banknifty', 'sp500', 's&p 500' in financial keywords
Bug 2 VERIFIED: classify_topic() at line 211 correctly classifies 'nifty 50' as financial domain via keyword matching
Bug 2 VERIFIED: freeze_prediction at line 2940-2946 overrides pred_type to DIRECTIONAL when tickers are found
Bug 3 VERIFIED: PREDICTION_TYPE_LABELS at line 2718 uses YES/NO for OUTCOME, POSITIVE/NEGATIVE for SENTIMENT
Bug 3 VERIFIED: freeze_prediction at lines 2985-3016 extracts type-appropriate direction labels
Bug 3 VERIFIED: Frontend getTypeLabels at line 2587 correctly maps prediction types to display labels
Note: Legacy predictions in database still have incorrect values (domain='general', UP/DOWN for OUTCOME) - these were created before bug fixes
seed_data_creation: Used existing session e72fbced-aaff-4e0f-b992-ae2397bbaadc with topic='nifty 50'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes iteration 15 verified. Three bugs fixed: (1) build_prediction_question respects user input > 10 chars; (2) KEYWORD_MAP includes nifty 50, sensex, banknifty, sp500 and classify_topic works correctly; (3) PREDICTION_TYPE_LABELS uses type-appropriate labels (YES/NO for OUTCOME, POSITIVE/NEGATIVE for SENTIMENT, UP/DOWN for DIRECTIONAL). Legacy predictions in database still have old incorrect values but new predictions will be correct. Session e72fbced has domain='financial' and is in graph_ready status.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_1_root_cause: build_prediction_question was always wrapping user input in template 'What will happen with X in Y?' regardless of whether user provided a specific question
rca_of_the_issue.bug_1_fix: Added check: if user_question and len(user_question.strip()) > 10, return user's question as-is
rca_of_the_issue.bug_2_root_cause: KEYWORD_MAP financial keywords did not include 'nifty 50' (with space), only 'nifty' and 'nifty50'
rca_of_the_issue.bug_2_fix: Added 'nifty 50' to financial keywords list, also added ticker-based DIRECTIONAL override in freeze_prediction
rca_of_the_issue.bug_3_root_cause: freeze_prediction was using UP/DOWN labels for all prediction types instead of type-appropriate labels
rca_of_the_issue.bug_3_fix: PREDICTION_TYPE_LABELS constant defines type-specific labels, freeze_prediction extracts direction based on pred_type
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All fixes verified via pytest backend tests and Playwright frontend tests

features_verified.build_prediction_question_user_input: VERIFIED - Returns user's question as-is if > 10 chars
features_verified.build_prediction_question_auto_generate: VERIFIED - Auto-generates domain-appropriate question if blank/short
features_verified.KEYWORD_MAP_financial_keywords: VERIFIED - Includes nifty 50, sensex, banknifty, sp500, s&p 500
features_verified.freeze_prediction_ticker_override: VERIFIED - Overrides to DIRECTIONAL when tickers found
features_verified.freeze_prediction_type_aware_labels: VERIFIED - Extracts direction based on pred_type
features_verified.frontend_getTypeLabels: VERIFIED - Correctly maps prediction types to display labels
